name: Payabbhi
description: API-first payment gateway and orchestration platform from RS Software with 60+ RESTful APIs.

seo.title: Payabbhi — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Payabbhi: API-first payment gateway and orchestration platform from RS Software with 60+ RESTful APIs.

when_to_use: Orchestrating payments across Indian PSPs via 60+ REST APIs
Smart routing to reduce failed transactions for Indian merchants
Unified webhook management across multiple Indian payment gateways

pros: Backed by RS Software, an established payments vendor
Covers gateway plus orchestration in one product
Reasonable pick for India and South Asia
cons: Smaller ecosystem than Razorpay or Juspay
review.verdict: Credible API-first option for India-centric payments, but global merchants will outgrow it quickly.
review.best_for: India-focused merchants and fintechs wanting a developer-friendly gateway with orchestration features.
review.not_for: Global enterprises needing deep non-Indian PSP coverage or large partner ecosystems.
